AssertionError: GEPA requires a reflection language model, or custom instruction proposer to be provided. Typically, you can use `dspy.LM(model='gpt-5', temperature=1.0, max_tokens=32000)` to get a good reflection model. Reflection LM is used by GEPA to reflect on the behavior of the program and propose new instructions, and will benefit from a strong model.
